summary: Replayed ADR 0251 from exact-main release 0.177.100 using committed source fad05e6af1cd920191051deaeac5d1d79116604e after merging the newer origin/main baseline, reran the Docker publication, step-ca, OpenBao, and Windmill converges, re-verified worker checkout parity together with the worker-local post-merge gate, confirmed the live gate-status and stage-smoke wrappers plus the authenticated runtime-assurance API, and reconfirmed that the promotion gate still rejects the stale staged grafana receipt for the expected reasons. This exact-main replay justifies advancing the verified platform baseline from 0.130.66 to 0.130.67.

verification.observed: `make converge-docker-runtime env=production` succeeded from committed source `fad05e6af1cd920191051deaeac5d1d79116604e`, with evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r31-converge-docker-runtime-0.177.100.txt` and final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=85 changed=5 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=6`.

`make converge-step-ca env=production` succeeded from the same committed source, with evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r32-converge-step-ca-0.177.100.txt` and final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=112 changed=3`, `proxmox_florin : ok=54 changed=4`, and all declared SSH-trust guests returning `failed=0`.

`make converge-openbao env=production` succeeded with evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r33-converge-openbao-0.177.100.txt`; the recap reported `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=155 changed=6 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=36` and `postgres-lv3 : ok=47 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=11`.

verification.check: Exact-main Windmill replay and worker checkout parity
verification.observed: `make converge-windmill env=production` succeeded with evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r34-converge-windmill-0.177.100.txt` and final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=283 changed=45 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=43`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=68 changed=0 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=15`, and `proxmox_florin : ok=41 changed=4 unreachable=0 failed=0 skipped=16`; the six sentinels in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r42-worker-checkout-hash-verify-0.177.100.txt` matched exactly between the active worktree and `/srv/proxmox_florin_server`.

verification.check: Worker post-merge gate and live gate-status
verification.observed: The worker-side `make post-merge-gate` replay passed through the intended `local-fallback` path with both commands returning `0`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r35-post-merge-gate-worker-0.177.100.txt`; the live `f/lv3/gate-status` wrapper returned top-level `status: ok` and `post_merge_run.status: passed` with `requested_checks: ["local-fallback"]`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r36-gate-status-live-post-release-0.177.100.json`.

The seeded `f/lv3/stage-smoke-suites` wrapper returned top-level `status: ok` and nested `status: passed`, with suite `production-windmill-primary-path` passing `tests/integration/test_deployment.py::test_windmill_version_endpoint_reports_version`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r37-stage-smoke-suites-live-post-release-0.177.100.json`.

verification.check: Runtime assurance and current server state
verification.observed: The authenticated runtime-assurance API returned `generated_at: 2026-03-30T10:58:35Z` with summary `total: 55`, `pass: 36`, `degraded: 19`, `failed: 0`, and `unknown: 0`, recorded in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r38-runtime-assurance-api-post-release-0.177.100.json`; fresh host and guest snapshots in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r40-latest-server-state-host-0.177.100.txt` and `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r41-latest-server-state-docker-runtime-0.177.100.txt` reconfirmed `pve-manager/9.1.6`, kernel `6.17.13-2-pve`, Windmill `CE v1.662.0`, and healthy unsealed OpenBao `2.5.1` on `127.0.0.1:8201`.

verification.check: Promotion gate still blocks the stale staged Grafana receipt
verification.observed: Running `./scripts/run_python_with_packages.sh pyyaml -- ./scripts/promotion_pipeline.py --check-gate --service grafana --staging-receipt receipts/live-applies/staging/2026-03-27-adr-0183-staging-live-apply.json` returned `gate_decision: rejected`, with evidence in `receipts/live-applies/evidence/2026-03-30-adr-0251-mainline-r39-promotion-gate-check-0.177.100.txt`; the rejection reasons were Prometheus SLO query timeouts, projected vCPU commitment `36.0` exceeding target `22.5`, and staging receipt age, while `approval.approved`, `stage_smoke_gate.passed`, and `staging_health_check.passed` all remained true.

notes: This receipt supersedes `2026-03-29-adr-0251-stage-smoke-promotion-gates-mainline-live-apply` as the canonical mainline ADR 0251 receipt for `promotion_pipeline`, `stage_smoke_suites`, and the current OpenBao follow-up verification path.

ADR metadata continues to preserve the first implementation facts `Implemented In Repo Version: 0.177.86`, `Implemented In Platform Version: 0.130.58`, and `Implemented On: 2026-03-29`; this receipt records the newer exact-main replay after origin/main advanced again on 2026-03-30.

The stale staged Grafana receipt still reported no required or observed stage-smoke suites, so this replay confirms the promotion gate remains intentionally blocking on stale-stage and capacity/SLO conditions rather than silently weakening the ADR 0251 contract.
